reasoning: Given the lack of web search functionality and the fetch_polymarket_info tool failing to extract the market slug, I must base my forecast on the provided 2025-10-16 market price of 57%. Between October 16 and October 26, 10 days out of the approximately 76 remaining days in the year have elapsed. Assuming Bitcoin behaves as a random walk and hasn't yet dipped below $100k without resolving the market, the passage of 10 days without a triggering event reduces the probability of a dip occurring before the end of the year. Adjusting the 57% probability for the reduced time horizon (from 76 days to 66 days) yields a slightly lower probability, approximately 52%.
